title: TB screening algorithm ValueSet Display Values
description: Display values for TB screening algorithm ValueSet ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

HIV.D.DE963.en: Sequential positive screening algorithm with W4SS and CRP

HIV.D.DE964.en: Sequential negative screening algorithm with W4SS and CRP
